constraints: do not modify external APIs
keep changes minimal

description: Retrieve previous bug fixes for date parsers to ensure consistency.
constraints: Use only verified decision artifacts

description: Deploy security patch to all running nodes concurrently.
constraints: Use orchestrator to split the task among 3 sub-agents
Do not bring the system down

description: Fix failing test in utils/date_parser, ensuring strict sandbox isolation.
constraints: Scope restricted strictly to ['utils/date_parser.py']
Reject any out-of-bounds patch attempts

description: Perform complex query: find reasons why date_parser failed in Iteration 001 without blowing up the context window.
constraints: Use Top-K semantic retrieval only
Do not load raw memory dumps

description: Deploy security patch to all running nodes concurrently, enforcing atomic updates via locks.
constraints: Use orchestrator to split the task among 3 sub-agents
Do not bring the system down
Ensure A2A locking prevents race conditions

description: Recover from an agent crashing mid-execution while holding the state lock.
constraints: Use TTL (Time-To-Live) leases
Do not hang indefinitely

description: Perform a heavy computation while preventing other agents from hijacking the TTL lease.
constraints: Use Active Heartbeat thread to renew TTL lease
Avoid Split-Brain state corruption

description: Coordinate two agents to process tasks sequentially without relying on blocking database locks.
constraints: Use PubSub / Event Bus architecture
Agent 1 must signal Agent 2 exactly when it's done

description: Prevent an unfixable poison pill event from bouncing infinitely between the main Queue and DLQ.
constraints: Implement a MAX_RETRIES header (e.g., 3 retries)
Permanently discard messages exceeding max retries
Do not hang the processing loop

description: Trigger an outbound Webhook to the Human Engineering Team when a task is permanently destroyed via Discard Bin.
constraints: Implement an Alerter monitoring the Discard Bin
Do not silently drop operations requested by users or orchestrators

description: Translate the 12 sandbox loops of PANOPTICON FORGE into a live integration blueprint for Skyforce Hermes.
constraints: Must map DLQs, TTL Locks, Heartbeats, and PubSub to actual Hermes node architecture
